function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "defer", "action_id": "recheck_5min", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -0.5, "adjustment_reasons": ["Guard source event (authorized personnel) is less likely to be threatening", "Background flag suggests routine/system event, not emergency", "Weak prior (n=0) allows moderate downward adjustment"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.3, "what_would_change_my_mind": "If the guard does not return to the zone within 5 minutes, or additional events/escalation occur at this zone, I would escalate to investigate or commit. Also if communication with the guard fails."}
